fa-trash-plus.appearanceId: a trash can silhouette with a lid and a small plus sign badge overlaid at the bottom-right corner; waste bin outline with an add or plus symbol indicator
fa-trash-plus.functionalityId: adds a new item to a trash or recycle bin collection; creates a new discard or deletion entry
fa-trash-plus.intentId: add an item to the trash or create a new deletable entry; manage disposal or discard actions in a content or file management interface

fa-trash-restore.appearanceId: a trash can silhouette with a curved counterclockwise restore arrow looping around or overlaid on the bin body; waste bin outline with a circular undo or restore arrow
fa-trash-restore.functionalityId: restores a previously deleted item from the trash back to its original location; undoes a deletion by recovering the item
fa-trash-restore.intentId: recover a deleted item from the trash to its original location; undo a deletion in a file manager or content management interface

fa-trash-restore-alt.appearanceId: a trash can silhouette with an alternative restore arrow design, such as a clockwise arc or a differently positioned undo arrow around the bin body; waste bin outline with an alternate curved restore arrow
fa-trash-restore-alt.functionalityId: restores a deleted item from the trash using an alternate restore action; recovers discarded content with a variant undo arrow style
fa-trash-restore-alt.intentId: recover a deleted item from the trash using an alternate restore control; undo a deletion in a file or content management interface

fa-trash-slash.appearanceId: a trash can silhouette with a diagonal slash line drawn through the entire bin body; waste bin outline with a forward-slash strikethrough indicating disabled or restricted deletion
fa-trash-slash.functionalityId: disables or prevents deletion of a selected item; indicates that an item cannot be moved to the trash
fa-trash-slash.intentId: prevent or disable deletion of an item; indicate that trashing or discarding is restricted in a file or content management interface

fa-trash-undo.appearanceId: a trash can silhouette with a curved leftward-pointing undo arrow overlaid on or beside the bin body; waste bin outline with an undo arrow indicating reversal
fa-trash-undo.functionalityId: undoes the last trash or deletion action; reverts a recently discarded item back out of the trash
fa-trash-undo.intentId: undo a recent deletion or trash action; revert a discarded item in a file manager or document editing interface

fa-trash-xmark.appearanceId: a trash can silhouette with a small X mark badge overlaid at the corner or center of the bin body; waste bin outline with a cancel or close X symbol indicator
fa-trash-xmark.functionalityId: permanently deletes or empties an item from the trash; cancels or removes a trash entry entirely
fa-trash-xmark.intentId: permanently delete an item or empty the trash; remove a discard entry without recovery in a file or content management interface

fa-treasure-chest.appearanceId: a rectangular wooden chest silhouette with a domed curved lid, metal latch hardware on the front, and banded or planked sides; pirate treasure chest outline with a rounded top lid and front clasp
fa-treasure-chest.functionalityId: represents a treasure chest containing rewards, loot, or valuable items; opens or indicates a reward cache in a game or prize interface
fa-treasure-chest.intentId: open or reveal a treasure chest for rewards or loot; indicate a prize cache or valuable item collection in a game or reward interface

fa-tree.appearanceId: a conical or rounded deciduous tree silhouette with a broad canopy on top and a short straight trunk at the base; standard tree outline with a rounded canopy and a simple trunk
fa-tree.functionalityId: represents a tree, plant life, or a natural environment; indicates an outdoor, nature, or environmental category in an interface
fa-tree.intentId: indicate nature, outdoor, or environmental content; represent a tree or plant in an ecology, park, or landscape interface

fa-tree-alt.appearanceId: an alternative tree silhouette with a differently shaped canopy such as a more irregular or stylized outline compared to the standard rounded tree, and a trunk at the base; variant tree outline with an alternate canopy shape and trunk
fa-tree-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternative or stylized tree shape for nature or environmental contexts; indicates a variant plant or tree in an outdoor or ecology interface
fa-tree-alt.intentId: indicate nature or outdoor content with an alternate tree symbol; represent a stylized tree or plant variant in an ecology or landscape interface

fa-tree-christmas.appearanceId: a conical Christmas tree silhouette with tiered layered branches decorated with small ornament dots and a star or topper at the apex, and a small trunk base; triangular Christmas tree outline with ornament decorations and a star topper
fa-tree-christmas.functionalityId: represents a decorated Christmas tree or holiday festivity symbol; indicates a Christmas season, holiday decoration, or festive theme
fa-tree-christmas.intentId: indicate a Christmas or holiday season theme; represent a Christmas tree decoration in a festive or seasonal interface

fa-tree-city.appearanceId: a tree silhouette with a rounded canopy positioned beside or in front of small rectangular building outlines representing an urban skyline; tree outline combined with city building silhouettes
fa-tree-city.functionalityId: represents urban greenery, a tree-lined city, or a parks-in-city concept; indicates a green city initiative or urban nature category
fa-tree-city.intentId: indicate urban greenery, city parks, or environmental urban planning; represent a tree-in-city or green infrastructure concept in an environmental or municipal interface

fa-tree-decorated.appearanceId: a conical tree silhouette with round ornament ball decorations hanging from the branches and a trunk at the base, without a star topper; triangular tree outline with circular ornament ball decorations and no top star
fa-tree-decorated.functionalityId: represents a decorated holiday tree with ornament balls; indicates a Christmas or holiday decoration theme with hanging ornaments
fa-tree-decorated.intentId: indicate a decorated holiday tree with ornaments; represent Christmas decorating or a festive ornament-hung tree in a seasonal interface

fa-tree-large.appearanceId: a tall conical or rounded tree silhouette with a proportionally taller or wider canopy compared to the standard tree, and a longer trunk; large tall tree outline with an oversized canopy and elongated trunk
fa-tree-large.functionalityId: represents a large or mature tree in a nature or landscaping context; indicates a tall tree species or a significant natural landmark
fa-tree-large.intentId: indicate a large or mature tree in a nature, forestry, or landscaping interface; represent a tall tree species or significant natural feature

fa-tree-palm.appearanceId: a palm tree silhouette with a curved or arching slender trunk and a cluster of long feathery fronds radiating from the top; palm tree outline with a curving trunk and drooping leaf fronds at the crown
fa-tree-palm.functionalityId: represents a palm tree or tropical vegetation in a nature or travel context; indicates a tropical, beach, or warm-climate environment
fa-tree-palm.intentId: indicate a tropical or beach environment; represent a palm tree or tropical destination in a travel, nature, or climate interface

fa-trees.appearanceId: two or more conical or rounded tree silhouettes grouped together side by side forming a small cluster or forest grouping; multiple tree outlines arranged as a grove or forest cluster
fa-trees.functionalityId: represents a cluster of trees, a forest, or a wooded area; indicates a forest zone, multi-tree planting, or woodland nature category
fa-trees.intentId: indicate a forest, woodland, or multi-tree nature area; represent a grove or forested environment in an ecology, hiking, or landscape interface

fa-triangle.appearanceId: a plain equilateral triangle shape with three equal straight sides and equal angles, with no interior decoration; solid or outlined equilateral triangle silhouette
fa-triangle.functionalityId: represents a triangular geometric shape for use in design, charting, or directional contexts; serves as a geometric element or directional pointer
fa-triangle.intentId: use a triangle shape as a geometric element, warning indicator, or directional pointer; represent a triangular form in a design or diagramming interface

fa-triangle-music.appearanceId: an equilateral triangle shape with a small musical note symbol displayed inside the interior of the triangle; triangle outline with a music note glyph centered inside
fa-triangle-music.functionalityId: represents a musical triangle instrument or a music category indicated by a triangular shape; indicates a percussion instrument or music-related content
fa-triangle-music.intentId: indicate a musical triangle instrument or a music category; represent a percussion item or musical element in a music or instrument interface

fa-tricycle.appearanceId: a small child's tricycle silhouette viewed from the side with a large front wheel, two smaller rear wheels, a seat, handlebars, and pedals; child tricycle outline with one large front wheel and two rear wheels
fa-tricycle.functionalityId: represents a tricycle or child's three-wheeled bike; indicates a children's ride-on toy, cycling activity, or recreational vehicle
fa-tricycle.intentId: indicate a child's tricycle or three-wheeled bike in a toy, recreational, or cycling interface; represent a children's ride-on vehicle

fa-tricycle-adult.appearanceId: an adult-sized tricycle silhouette viewed from the side with three wheels, a rear cargo basket or frame, an upright seat, and handlebars; adult tricycle outline with three wheels and a rear cargo area
fa-tricycle-adult.functionalityId: represents an adult tricycle or three-wheeled adult cycling vehicle; indicates an adaptive cycling, senior mobility, or cargo tricycle context
fa-tricycle-adult.intentId: indicate an adult tricycle for mobility, recreation, or cargo transport; represent adaptive cycling or a three-wheeled adult bike in a transportation or accessibility interface

fa-trillium.appearanceId: a trillium flower silhouette with three broad rounded petals arranged symmetrically around a center point and three narrow sepals alternating between the petals; three-petal trillium flower outline with alternating sepals
fa-trillium.functionalityId: represents a trillium wildflower in a botanical, nature, or floral context; indicates a spring wildflower, native plant, or floral decoration
fa-trillium.intentId: indicate a trillium flower in a botanical, nature, or floral design interface; represent a spring wildflower or native plant category

fa-trophy.appearanceId: a cup trophy silhouette with two curved side handles, a wide goblet-shaped bowl on top, and a narrow stem and base pedestal; classic award trophy outline with side handles, a cup bowl, and a base
fa-trophy.functionalityId: represents an award, achievement, or competition victory; indicates a top-ranked result, winner status, or achievement badge
fa-trophy.intentId: indicate an award, achievement, or competition win; display a trophy or victory symbol in a leaderboard, game, or recognition interface

fa-trophy-alt.appearanceId: an alternative trophy silhouette with a slightly different cup shape, handle style, or base configuration compared to the standard trophy; alternate award cup outline with a varied handle or bowl design
fa-trophy-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternative award or achievement trophy style; indicates a variant winner or achievement symbol in a leaderboard or reward interface
fa-trophy-alt.intentId: indicate an award or achievement using an alternate trophy symbol; display a variant trophy in a leaderboard, game, or recognition interface

fa-trowel.appearanceId: a masonry trowel silhouette with a flat triangular or diamond-shaped blade and a short handle attached at the blunt end; trowel tool outline with a flat pointed blade and a grip handle
fa-trowel.functionalityId: represents a trowel tool used for spreading mortar, plaster, or soil; indicates masonry, gardening, or construction tool usage
fa-trowel.intentId: indicate masonry, construction, or gardening work with a trowel; represent a spreading or plastering tool in a construction or gardening interface

fa-trowel-bricks.appearanceId: a masonry trowel silhouette positioned beside or above a small stack of rectangular brick shapes; trowel outline with a brick stack indicating masonry construction
fa-trowel-bricks.functionalityId: represents bricklaying or masonry construction with a trowel and bricks; indicates a construction, building, or masonry category
fa-trowel-bricks.intentId: indicate bricklaying, masonry, or construction work; represent a construction or building activity in a contractor, home improvement, or architecture interface

fa-truck.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with a cab at the front, a long cargo box trailer, and wheels at the front axle and rear axle; delivery truck profile outline with a cab and enclosed cargo box
fa-truck.functionalityId: represents a delivery truck or freight vehicle; indicates shipping, logistics, or cargo transport in a commerce or fleet interface
fa-truck.intentId: indicate freight shipping, cargo delivery, or logistics; represent a delivery truck or transport vehicle in a commerce or fleet management interface

fa-truck-arrow-right.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with a rightward-pointing arrow overlaid on or beside the cargo body; delivery truck profile outline with a right-direction arrow badge
fa-truck-arrow-right.functionalityId: represents a truck departing, moving forward, or being redirected to the right; indicates outbound delivery, forwarding, or a route change
fa-truck-arrow-right.intentId: indicate outbound shipping, truck departure, or a rightward route in a logistics interface; represent a delivery truck moving to a new destination

fa-truck-bolt.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with a lightning bolt symbol overlaid on the cargo body; delivery truck profile outline with an electric bolt badge indicating electric power
fa-truck-bolt.functionalityId: represents an electric delivery truck or electrified freight vehicle; indicates an EV truck, fast delivery, or electrically powered transport
fa-truck-bolt.intentId: indicate an electric truck or fast electrified delivery vehicle; represent EV freight, rapid shipping, or electric transport in a logistics or sustainability interface

fa-truck-clock.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with a clock face symbol overlaid on the cargo area; delivery truck profile outline with a clock badge indicating scheduled or timed delivery
fa-truck-clock.functionalityId: represents a scheduled delivery truck or time-based freight dispatch; indicates delivery timing, ETA, or a timed shipment notification
fa-truck-clock.intentId: track or schedule a timed truck delivery or freight dispatch; indicate delivery ETA or a time-sensitive shipment in a logistics or e-commerce interface

fa-truck-container.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with a large rectangular shipping container box on the trailer bed, showing visible container panel lines; truck cab profile with a standard ISO shipping container body
fa-truck-container.functionalityId: represents a container truck or intermodal freight vehicle carrying a shipping container; indicates container transport, port logistics, or intermodal shipping
fa-truck-container.intentId: indicate container shipping or intermodal freight transport; represent a container truck in a port, logistics, or supply chain interface

fa-truck-container-empty.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with an empty or open-top rectangular container frame on the trailer, showing an unfilled or hollow container body; truck cab profile with an empty open container frame
fa-truck-container-empty.functionalityId: represents an empty container truck returning without cargo; indicates an empty container return, repositioning, or a vacant freight vehicle
fa-truck-container-empty.intentId: indicate an empty container truck or a vehicle returning without cargo; represent empty container repositioning or availability in a logistics or port interface

fa-truck-couch.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with a couch or sofa shape visible through or overlaid on the cargo box area; moving truck profile outline with a furniture couch silhouette inside the cargo body
fa-truck-couch.functionalityId: represents a furniture delivery or moving truck carrying household items; indicates a moving service, furniture transport, or home delivery vehicle
fa-truck-couch.intentId: indicate a furniture delivery or household moving service; represent a moving truck carrying furniture in a relocation or delivery interface

fa-truck-droplet.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with a water droplet shape overlaid on the cargo tank or body; tanker truck profile outline with a liquid droplet badge indicating liquid transport
fa-truck-droplet.functionalityId: represents a water tanker truck or liquid delivery vehicle; indicates liquid freight, water transport, or chemical tanker logistics
fa-truck-droplet.intentId: indicate liquid freight transport or a water tanker delivery; represent a liquid or chemical tanker truck in a logistics or utilities interface

fa-truck-fast.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with horizontal speed lines extending behind the cab or cargo area to suggest rapid motion; delivery truck profile outline with motion speed streaks indicating fast movement
fa-truck-fast.functionalityId: represents express or fast delivery service with a truck; indicates rapid shipping, expedited freight, or same-day delivery
fa-truck-fast.intentId: indicate express or expedited delivery service; represent fast shipping or rush freight in an e-commerce or logistics interface

fa-truck-field.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with terrain bumps, grass tufts, or field ground elements beneath the wheels; truck profile outline with off-road or agricultural field ground detail
fa-truck-field.functionalityId: represents a field service truck or off-road agricultural vehicle; indicates field operations, agricultural transport, or off-road fleet vehicles
fa-truck-field.intentId: indicate field service, agricultural transport, or off-road vehicle operations; represent a field truck in an agricultural, utility, or off-road logistics interface

fa-truck-field-un.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette on field terrain with a UN or organizational badge overlaid on the cargo body; field truck profile outline with an identification or organizational marker badge
fa-truck-field-un.functionalityId: represents a UN or humanitarian field operations truck used in disaster relief or peacekeeping; indicates an official or marked humanitarian vehicle
fa-truck-field-un.intentId: indicate a UN or humanitarian aid vehicle operating in field conditions; represent official or relief organization transport in a humanitarian or emergency operations interface

fa-truck-fire.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with a flame shape overlaid on the cargo area or cab; truck profile outline with a fire or flame badge indicating fire-related operations
fa-truck-fire.functionalityId: represents a fire truck or emergency fire response vehicle; indicates firefighting operations, fire department fleet, or emergency response
fa-truck-fire.intentId: indicate a fire truck or emergency fire response vehicle; represent firefighting operations or fire department fleet in an emergency services interface

fa-truck-flatbed.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with an open flat platform trailer bed with no enclosed sides or roof behind the cab; truck cab profile with an open flatbed trailer platform
fa-truck-flatbed.functionalityId: represents a flatbed truck used for carrying large or oversized cargo; indicates flatbed freight, heavy equipment transport, or open cargo hauling
fa-truck-flatbed.intentId: indicate flatbed freight or oversized cargo transport; represent a flatbed truck in a heavy equipment, construction, or logistics interface

fa-truck-front.appearanceId: a front-facing truck cab view showing the grille, headlights, bumper, and windshield of the truck from a head-on perspective; front-view truck cab outline showing grille and headlights
fa-truck-front.functionalityId: represents the front face of a truck or a head-on vehicle view; indicates a truck approaching, a front-view vehicle identifier, or a transport symbol
fa-truck-front.intentId: indicate a truck from the front or represent a vehicle approaching head-on; use as a transport or fleet identifier in a logistics or routing interface

fa-truck-ladder.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with an extended ladder or boom arm elevated above the cargo area; truck profile outline with a raised aerial ladder or extension boom
fa-truck-ladder.functionalityId: represents an aerial ladder truck or elevated-access emergency vehicle; indicates fire department aerial operations or utility elevated-access work
fa-truck-ladder.intentId: indicate an aerial ladder truck or elevated-access vehicle; represent fire department or utility aerial operations in an emergency services or infrastructure interface

fa-truck-loading.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette backed up to a loading dock ramp with boxes or cargo items shown transferring from the dock into the cargo area; truck backed to a dock with cargo boxes being loaded
fa-truck-loading.functionalityId: represents a truck at a loading dock actively loading or unloading cargo; indicates loading dock operations, freight handling, or shipment processing
fa-truck-loading.intentId: indicate loading dock operations or freight loading and unloading; represent cargo processing or warehouse logistics in a supply chain interface

fa-truck-monster.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with exaggeratedly oversized raised suspension and very large off-road monster truck wheels under the cab and body; truck cab outline with giant oversized monster truck tires
fa-truck-monster.functionalityId: represents a monster truck or extreme off-road vehicle with oversized wheels; indicates a monster truck event, extreme vehicle, or entertainment spectacle
fa-truck-monster.intentId: indicate a monster truck event or extreme off-road vehicle; represent entertainment motorsports or an oversized truck in a game or events interface

fa-truck-moving.appearanceId: a side-view moving truck silhouette with a large enclosed cargo box body and motion lines or open rear doors suggesting active relocation; moving van profile outline with a large box body and relocation indicators
fa-truck-moving.functionalityId: represents a moving truck or relocation van for household or office moves; indicates a moving service, relocation, or home goods transport
fa-truck-moving.intentId: indicate a household or office moving service; represent a relocation or moving van in a home services or real estate interface

fa-truck-pickup.appearanceId: a side-view pickup truck silhouette with a cab at the front and an open cargo bed at the rear without a cover; pickup truck profile outline with a cab and open rear bed
fa-truck-pickup.functionalityId: represents a pickup truck or light-duty utility vehicle; indicates a pickup truck category, utility vehicle, or personal cargo hauling
fa-truck-pickup.intentId: indicate a pickup truck or light utility vehicle; represent a personal cargo hauling or utility vehicle in an automotive or fleet interface

fa-truck-plane.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with a small airplane or aircraft shape overlaid on the cargo body; delivery truck profile outline with an airplane badge indicating air freight partnership
fa-truck-plane.functionalityId: represents multimodal freight combining truck and air transport; indicates air freight, ground-to-air logistics, or intermodal shipping
fa-truck-plane.intentId: indicate multimodal or air-and-ground freight logistics; represent a truck-and-plane shipping combination in a logistics or supply chain interface

fa-truck-plow.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with a large angled plow blade attached to the front bumper area; truck profile outline with a front-mounted snowplow or grading blade
fa-truck-plow.functionalityId: represents a snowplow truck or road-clearing vehicle with a front plow blade; indicates snow removal, road maintenance, or winter operations

fa-truck-ramp.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with a loading ramp extended from the rear of the cargo body down to ground level; moving truck profile outline with a rear ramp extension deployed

fa-truck-ramp.intentId: indicate ramp-access loading or unloading from a truck; represent furniture or equipment loading via a rear ramp in a moving or freight interface

fa-truck-tow.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with a tow hook or tow arm attached at the rear, and a smaller vehicle or a tow cable visible behind; tow truck profile outline with a rear tow hook or lift arm
fa-truck-tow.functionalityId: represents a tow truck or vehicle recovery service; indicates roadside assistance, vehicle towing, or breakdown recovery
fa-truck-tow.intentId: indicate vehicle towing or roadside recovery assistance; represent a tow truck or breakdown service in a roadside assistance or automotive interface

fa-truck-utensils.appearanceId: a side-view truck silhouette with a fork and knife or dining utensil symbols overlaid on the cargo body; food truck profile outline with a fork-and-knife badge indicating food service
